Defeat Fan Zhendong

A table tennis tactical simulator based on real-world strategic analysis.
You're a world top-20 player facing peak-form Fan Zhendong in an elimination match.
Every point requires tactical decisions—serve placement, receive strategy, rally tactics.
Can you defeat him in a best-of-seven match?

Scouting Report: Fan Zhendong

Playing Style

Right-handed shakehand grip, two-wing loop-drive with close-to-table power game. Fan is an aggressive attacker who dominates with his backhand and excels in rapid fire exchanges near the table. He rarely plays passively.

Aggressive Two-Wing Attack Backhand Dominant

Key Statistics

Backhand flip usage: 34.77% | Scoring rate: 60.50% | Ball speed: up to 19 m/s | Spin: up to 146 RPM

These numbers reflect Fan's relentless attacking approach and exceptional consistency at the highest level.

Backhand Attack Strength95%
Consistency92%
Speed & Timing90%

Critical Weaknesses

  • Middle/Body Transition Zone: The narrow zone between his backhand and forehand is a strategic vulnerability. He struggles when forced to choose between grips.
  • Predictable Receive Patterns: His receive strategy follows consistent patterns. Vary your serve placement and rotation to disrupt his rhythm.
  • Forehand Crossover Point: When forced to transition from backhand to forehand, there's a brief moment of vulnerability in his positioning.
  • Tactical Inflexibility: While extraordinarily skilled, Fan relies heavily on power and aggression. Rhythm variation and extended rallies can frustrate him.

Tactical Plan

Serve Strategy: Employ reverse pendulum serves with varied rotation to his backhand. Mix in no-spin short serves to the middle and occasional long balls to disrupt his rhythm.

Rally Strategy: Repeatedly target his middle/body transition zone. Vary the pace and spin to prevent him from entering his comfort zone. Avoid backhand-to-backhand exchanges—this is his domain.

Key Principles: Control the tempo, vary your rhythm, keep him guessing about rotation, and exploit the middle constantly. Patience and tactical discipline are your advantages.

You
0 : 0
Fan
